widgets_values: A young woman with dark hair and a red bindi, wearing a white halter-style bikini top and matching bottoms, rises gracefully from her seated position on the warm sand. Her posture is poised as she pushes herself up using her arms, shoulders lifting slightly to meet the sunlit horizon. The camera remains locked in a full body long shot, capturing her movement with a slow dolly forward as she stands tall, eyes meeting the lens with a soft gaze and lips parted slightly — conveying quiet confidence without overt expression.

Her posture is poised as she pushes herself up using her arms, shoulders lifting slightly to meet the sunlit horizon. The camera remains locked in a full body long shot, capturing her movement with a slow dolly forward as she stands tall, eyes meeting the lens with a soft gaze and lips parted slightly — conveying quiet confidence without overt expression.", "duration": "3"}, {"scene": 2, "cinematic": "She begins walking slowly along the shoreline, bare feet sinking gently into the damp sand. Her gait is fluid and deliberate, hips swaying subtly as she moves toward the ocean’s edge. The camera tracks her movement with a smooth, handheld tracking motion, keeping her centered in frame while allowing glimpses of turquoise waves breaking nearby. Sunlight glints off her skin and wet sand beneath her feet — no fabric or clothing layer is altered yet; only natural motion.", "duration": "3"}, {"scene": 3, "cinematic": "As she reaches a shallow point near the water’s edge, she pauses and turns slightly so that her back faces the camera. With both hands reaching behind her, she gently lifts the straps of her bikini top over her shoulders — revealing full exposure to the sunlit air. Her arms rise with controlled grace, fingers flexing as if adjusting to gravity; eyes remain locked on the horizon, gaze steady and unflinching. The fabric layers are lifted without tearing or slipping — a slow, deliberate motion that frames her torso against the backdrop of crashing waves.", "duration": "6"}]

nodes.title: Prompt
widgets_values: A young woman with long dark hair and a red bindi sits on a stone bench in a sunlit mountain village street, wearing a full-length golden-yellow lehenga choli with intricate embroidery. She rises gracefully from the bench using her right hand to push off the bench’s edge, her posture upright and poised as she stands fully. Her gaze is direct toward the camera, eyes soft and warm, lips slightly parted in a gentle smile — no abstract emotion, only physical cues of rising and turning to face forward.
